parameters.responseBody:
={
  "status": "success",
  "phase": {{ $('Parse & Validate Input').item.json.phase }},
  "intensity": "{{ $('Parse & Validate Input').item.json.intensity }}",
  "description": "{{ $('Parse & Validate Input').item.json.description }}",
  "message": "Phase transition triggered successfully",
  "timestamp": "{{ $('Parse & Validate Input').item.json.timestamp }}"
}
